news.title:
Nuvama maintains Buy on United Spirits, target price Rs 1660, citing improved capital allocation.
RCB stake sale removes overhang, unlocks funds, enables potential dividend and strategic clarity.
news.summary:
Nuvama maintains Buy on United Spirits, target price Rs 1660, citing improved capital allocation.
RCB stake sale removes overhang, unlocks funds, enables potential dividend and strategic clarity.

news.title: Elara Capital upgrades United Spirits to Buy with a target of ₹1,650.
news.summary: Elara Capital upgrades United Spirits to Buy with a target of ₹1,650.

news.title: United Spirits sells RCB; Aditya Birla Group, Brookfield, Times Internet, and Bolt Ventures are buyers.
news.summary: United Spirits sells RCB; Aditya Birla Group, Brookfield, Times Internet, and Bolt Ventures are buyers.

news.title:
CLSA maintains a Hold on United Spirits with a ₹1300 target price.
RCB's ₹166.6bn sale values it at ~$1.2bn (~₹213/share), limiting upside.
news.summary:
CLSA maintains a Hold on United Spirits with a ₹1300 target price.
RCB's ₹166.6bn sale values it at ~$1.2bn (~₹213/share), limiting upside.

news.title:
BEL signed an MoU with RRP Group to boost defence tech; United Spirits sold RCSPL stake for ₹16,660 crore.
Tata Steel invested $180M in T Steel; Jindal Steel's BOF-3 raised crude steel capacity to 12 MTPA.
news.summary:
BEL signed an MoU with RRP Group to boost defence tech; United Spirits sold RCSPL stake for ₹16,660 crore.
Tata Steel invested $180M in T Steel; Jindal Steel's BOF-3 raised crude steel capacity to 12 MTPA.

news.title: United Spirits shares may surge after a ₹16,600 crore gain from the RCB deal.
news.summary: United Spirits shares may surge after a ₹16,600 crore gain from the RCB deal.

news.title:
United Spirits sold IPL franchise RCB for ₹16,600 crore; shares set to react.
RCB sale highlights Sun TV (Sunrisers Hyderabad) and RPSG Ventures (Lucknow Supergiants).
news.summary:
United Spirits sold IPL franchise RCB for ₹16,600 crore; shares set to react.
RCB sale highlights Sun TV (Sunrisers Hyderabad) and RPSG Ventures (Lucknow Supergiants).

news.title:
United Spirits Ltd (USL) approves sale of its 100% stake in Royal Challengers Sports Pvt Ltd (RCSPL) for INR 166.6 bn.
The acquiring consortium includes Aditya Birla Group, Times Group, Bolt Ventures, and Blackstone. RCSPL owns IPL and WPL franchises.
news.summary:
United Spirits Ltd (USL) approves sale of its 100% stake in Royal Challengers Sports Pvt Ltd (RCSPL) for INR 166.6 bn.
The acquiring consortium includes Aditya Birla Group, Times Group, Bolt Ventures, and Blackstone. RCSPL owns IPL and WPL franchises.

news.title:
Liquor stocks like United Spirits, Radico Khaitan surged 4-7% due to Karnataka's excise reforms, deregulating alcohol pricing.
Reforms include AIB-based taxation, reducing price categories, boosting premium brands, and targeting long-term revenue growth.
news.summary:
Liquor stocks like United Spirits, Radico Khaitan surged 4-7% due to Karnataka's excise reforms, deregulating alcohol pricing.
Reforms include AIB-based taxation, reducing price categories, boosting premium brands, and targeting long-term revenue growth.

news.title:
Analysts see Karnataka's new policies offering limited benefits to United Spirits.
This indicates potential challenges ahead for the company.
news.summary:
Analysts see Karnataka's new policies offering limited benefits to United Spirits.
This indicates potential challenges ahead for the company.

news.title:
United Spirits wins CESTAT case, ₹141 crore excise duty and penalty dropped.
Q3FY26 net profit rose 11.8%, NSV grew 7.6% driven by Prestige & Above segment.
news.summary:
United Spirits wins CESTAT case, ₹141 crore excise duty and penalty dropped.
Q3FY26 net profit rose 11.8%, NSV grew 7.6% driven by Prestige & Above segment.

news.title:
CESTAT ruled in favor of United Spirits on royalty valuation for FY1997-2005.
Excise duty demand of INR 79.8 cr, interest, and penalty deleted with no financial impact.
news.summary:
CESTAT ruled in favor of United Spirits on royalty valuation for FY1997-2005.
Excise duty demand of INR 79.8 cr, interest, and penalty deleted with no financial impact.

news.title:
United Spirits, owned by Diageo, reports unchanged organic operating profit growth.
This indicates stability in the financial performance of United Spirits.
news.summary:
United Spirits, owned by Diageo, reports unchanged organic operating profit growth.
This indicates stability in the financial performance of United Spirits.

news.title:
Diageo, parent of United Spirits, reports 2-3% drop in organic sales.
Decline attributed to weak global demand impacting performance.
news.summary:
Diageo, parent of United Spirits, reports 2-3% drop in organic sales.
Decline attributed to weak global demand impacting performance.

news.title:
United Spirits reports Q3 miss but anticipates a Q4 recovery.
Som Distilleries focuses on UP plant; beer sales hit by weather woes.
news.summary:
United Spirits reports Q3 miss but anticipates a Q4 recovery.
Som Distilleries focuses on UP plant; beer sales hit by weather woes.

news.title:
United Spirits initiates due diligence for Royal Challengers Bengaluru with several bidders selected.
The evaluation process for the team is scheduled for this week.
news.summary:
United Spirits initiates due diligence for Royal Challengers Bengaluru with several bidders selected.
The evaluation process for the team is scheduled for this week.

news.title:
United Spirits invested INR 3.2 crore in Sober, increasing stake from 15% to 25%.
Sober's FY25 projected turnover is INR 1.49 crore, with net worth of INR 1.18 crore.
news.summary:
United Spirits invested INR 3.2 crore in Sober, increasing stake from 15% to 25%.
Sober's FY25 projected turnover is INR 1.49 crore, with net worth of INR 1.18 crore.

news.title:
United Spirits released Q3 and 9-month earnings call transcript for Dec 31, 2025.
Transcript available on company website, detailing financial discussions for investors.
news.summary:
United Spirits released Q3 and 9-month earnings call transcript for Dec 31, 2025.
Transcript available on company website, detailing financial discussions for investors.

news.title:
United Spirits reaffirms double-digit P&A guidance under normal conditions.
India-UK FTA could unlock additional opportunities for the company.
news.summary:
United Spirits reaffirms double-digit P&A guidance under normal conditions.
India-UK FTA could unlock additional opportunities for the company.

news.title:
United Spirits projects a marketing reinvestment rate of 10.6% of net sales for FY26.
The rate may exceed 10.6% due to premium portfolio recovery and tactical investments.
news.summary:
United Spirits projects a marketing reinvestment rate of 10.6% of net sales for FY26.
The rate may exceed 10.6% due to premium portfolio recovery and tactical investments.
